featureName: Market Action Center and Guided Tools
evidenceBoundary: Planning-owned structured handoff only. Feature 012 implementation tests and execution evidence do not exist yet. The traceability guard is expected to remain nonzero until bubbles.implement and bubbles.test create the planned files and append current-session evidence to the per-scope reports.
rowResolution: Each object mirrors the Test Plan row with the same id in scopeRef; scopes/*/scope.md remains the planning source of truth.
